name: KTLYST - NYS Office of Information Technology Services - Phishing Domains (2026-04-12)
description: Phishing infrastructure identified by KTLYST for NYS Office of Information Technology Services. Block inbound mail referencing these domains and rewrite any outbound links through URL Defense.
organization: NYS Office of Information Technology Services
